title: Bridge Essay: Classic Hallucinogens and Mystical Experiences: Phenomenology and Neural Correlates.
concept: Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

**Classic Hallucinogens and Mystical Experiences: Phenomenology and Neural Correlates.** - Curr Top Behav Neurosci (2018). DOI: 10.1007/7854_2017_474. PMID: 28401522. This chapter begins with a brief review of descriptions and definitions of mystical-type experiences and the historical connection between classic hallucinogens and mystical experiences. The chapter then explores the empirical literature on experiences with classic hallucinogens in which claims about mystical or religious experiences have been made. A psychometrically validated questionnaire is described for the reliable measurement of mystical-type experiences occasioned by classic hallucinogen
